examples: The meat is tucked into semolina rolls from Parisi bakery on Elizabeth Street.
This paper expounds the definition and application of semolina and farina;
Couscous is a granular semolina that is soaked until soft. It is served like rice.
The lamb is served alongside Semolina Gnocchi covered in butter and sage, temporarily transporting you from the bustle of The Strip to the tranquility of the Tuscan countryside.
